title: Observation-Settlement Join
description: Joins METAR observations to NWS CLI daily reports to Kalshi market settlements. Schema for the observation-settlement joined record.

station_code.description: NWS station code (shared key across all three entities).

observation_date.description: Local date of observation. Timezone conversion: UTC observation → station local time → date. During DST, NWS uses local STANDARD time (observation window 1:00 AM to 12:59 AM next day).

cli_high_temp_f.description: Daily high from NWS CLI report (settlement source). From climate.high_temp_f with report_type='final'.

cli_low_temp_f.description: Daily low from NWS CLI report (settlement source). From climate.low_temp_f with report_type='final'.

metar_high_temp_f.description: Highest temp_f from METAR observations for this station+date. May differ from CLI high due to rounding, observation window, or sensor differences.

metar_low_temp_f.description: Lowest temp_f from METAR observations for this station+date.

metar_count.description: Number of METAR observations for this station+date. Expect ~24 for a full day. <16 suggests gaps.

market_ticker.description: Kalshi market ticker for this station+date+measure.

measure_type.description: Which temperature measure this market tracks.

settlement_consistent.description: True if the CLI value falls within the market bracket AND market_result='yes', OR CLI value falls outside AND market_result='no'. False = settlement anomaly worth investigating.

cli_metar_delta_f.description: Difference between CLI high/low and METAR max/min for the same day. Large deltas suggest data quality issues or rounding differences.

$comment: JOIN RULES: (1) observation.station_code = climate.station_code = series.station_code. (2) observation UTC → station local date = climate.observation_date. (3) climate.report_type should be 'final' for settlement. If only 'preliminary' exists, flag as unconfirmed. (4) Kalshi settlement at 10:00 AM ET using NOWData display. Corrections after 10:00 AM ET do NOT change settlement. Settlement delayed until 12:00 PM ET if CLI high inconsistent with 6-hr/24-hr METAR highs. (5) Rounding: NWS 5-minute readings undergo F→C→F conversion, so displayed 70F could originate from 69.5-70.4F. (6) SETTLEMENT SOURCES BY EXCHANGE: Kalshi = NWS CLI, Robinhood = Weather Underground, ForecastEx = unconfirmed. This join is Kalshi-specific. (7) CROSS-VALIDATION: max_temp_24hr_f from METAR should correlate with cli_high_temp_f. GHCNd TMAX (tenths °C) provides independent check. (8) DST: CLI uses Local Standard Time year-round. During DST, observation window is 1:00 AM to 12:59 AM next day local clock.
